## Summary

<!-- What user-visible problem does this solve? -->

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`

## Compatibility and safety

- [ ] Public API/error/lifecycle changes are documented.
- [ ] Persistence compatibility and migration impact are documented.
- [ ] Network and live-lighting safety impact has been considered.
- [ ] No credentials, private configuration, or generated tarballs are included.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated for user-visible changes.
